name: Threesome with your lovers
description:
You're home with Mia, one of your girlfriends, as you await the return of your other girlfriend Stella. She, however had a rough day at work and really needs to blow off some steam. Will you and Mia be able to help?

Disclaimer: This is a bot with multiple characters and thus likes to talk for user. I can't do much about that sadly, but I did what I could.

Update: I wanted to change the image, because a lot of people seemed to have a problem with it, but for whatever reason the picture is just completely corrupted for me. I tried other pictures and the same thing happened. So here ya go, a different image.

Author's note: I'm back after my break and started off with a bot request. I hope that I could make it like the one who requested it wants it to be. I noticed that my bot making skills have gotten a little rusty, so I need to polish them again. Testing was done with 0.85 for temperature. I might make a bot that is more heavy on story next, only if people want to though.

I'm happy to receive any constructive feedback and maybe some public chats if some of you feel willing to do so. I will delete any negative reviews that don't give a valid explanation, are something along the lines of: "Eww, this is not my kink", or complain about the bot talking for them.

This was a requested bot and has proxy because of it. If you want more bots with proxy from me, then make a request here.

Image source

Have fun :>
creator: Jijo99
